title: How to use "Install Missing Content" to download cars

messages.content: # Wondering how to install No Hesi cars? Follow this guide!

## Step 2. 
> At the top right, open the ≡ menu, wait for the car(s) to download and then press Install.

## Step 3. 
> MAKE SURE TO ALWAYS RESTART CONTENT MANAGER AFTER INSTALLING CARS.
> -# This will fix the obsolete version error.
